title: thuja occidentalis f. mastersii
intro: Thuja occidentalis f. mastersii is a variant of Eastern White Cedar, a fragrant, evergreen shrub native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Thuja occidentalis f. mastersii include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Herbal preparations of this plant often include essential oils and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
